preferences.statement: Quality over quantity. One excellent implementation beats five weak ones.
Bootstrap Mode stays active until AG OS-attributable revenue exists or the owner disables it.
No fabricated or fixture registry records. Registries stay production-clean.
Unknown values use REQUIRED_ placeholders in templates only; active records must not carry placeholders.
Use the existing stack first: Hetzner VPS, Postgres, n8n, GitHub, Netlify, existing domain, and Claude credits.
GitHub is the source of truth for all AG OS work.
Base44 is optional for prototypes only and is never source of truth.
Lead Gen is a protected finished production project in observe/read-only mode.
AI Receptionist is a separate product project, not AG OS core.
Command-driven execution: the owner states the outcome and AG OS handles safe execution steps.
The owner does not want to micromanage routine safe steps; AG OS stops only at approval gates and stop conditions.

notes: Only preferences explicitly stated by the owner. New preferences require an explicit owner statement and a reviewed PR.
